name: detectors: each TS detector honors §2.2 contract flags
command: for d in no-any exhaustive-unions type-test-coverage; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" --help 2>&1 | grep -E "\-\-json.*\-\-paths.*\-\-dry-run" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $d contract flags missing" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
